prompt: Ever since we merged the spring-schedule branch, the vanpool coordinator has been quietly wrong in three different ways and `ruby -w` won't shut up about the file. Symptoms from this week's inbox: the elm van claims it only seats 6 when every van we lease has 7, riders who committed to the monthly punch card are being charged full fare again, and finance bounced the month-end statement because the fuel-surcharge line vanished from it. Our CI gate is `ruby test_vanpool.rb` — it now includes a check that loads the library under `ruby -w` and fails on ANY warning output, and the behavior tests pin what each number and statement line should be. Clean up whatever the merge left behind until the whole suite is green. Don't touch test_vanpool.rb, and don't rewrite working logic — the warnings are pointing at everything that needs to change.
notes: 5W2 item 4: ruby -w sweep, ruby 4.0.5. PIVOT DOCUMENTED: the catalog's 'uninitialized instance variable' and 'shadowed block-local' warnings were REMOVED from ruby -w in Ruby 3.0 (probed silent on this box's 4.0.5), so those two elements are replaced with two -w classes that DO fire and carry the same messy-merge lesson: duplicated-and-overwritten hash key (DEFAULTS has seats: twice; stale 6 overrides intended 7) and 'statement not reached' (a leftover early return in statement_lines cuts off the fuel-surcharge line). The catalog's core element stands: 'method redefined; discarding old' x2 — stale duplicate defs of fare_cents_for (drops the monthly discount) and seats_left (reads DEFAULTS instead of the merged config) sit at the bottom of the class like a merge tail; later-def-wins makes the stale copies live at baseline. All warnings probed to fire through require under -w. Harness per family law: a minitest case shells out Open3.capture3(RbConfig.ruby, '-w', '-I', dir, '-r', 'vanpool', '-e', driver) and asserts stderr is EMPTY (fails on any warning); behavior tests pin seats=7 default, override wins, discount 230, exact 3-line statement. Baseline fails 5 of 7 tests (4 behavioral + gate). Every fix is a deletion of merge leftovers; no restructuring. Domain: office vanpool/carpool — no existing seed (go-farebands is transit fare banding, csharp-ferryhub is ferries; different domain and defect class).
